# `PackageJsonAdapter`

The subset of RuntimeAdapter needed for package.json discovery.

Using a narrow pick keeps the function easy to test and makes the
dependency explicit.

- Import: `@kjanat/dreamcli`
- Export kind: type
- Declared in: `src/core/config/package-json.ts`
- Source link: [`src/core/config/package-json.ts:44`](https://github.com/kjanat/dreamcli/blob/master/src/core/config/package-json.ts#L44)

## Signatures

```ts
type PackageJsonAdapter = Pick<RuntimeAdapter, 'readFile' | 'cwd'>;
```
